Here's the result of running `cat -n` on C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_25934c09623e4c1d8580bd97f38ba52f_i1q0hr_g\app.py:
1	from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request, flash
2	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
3	from flask_login import LoginManager, UserMixin, login_user, login_required, logout_user, current_user
4	from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
5	from datetime import datetime
6	
7	app = Flask(__name__)
8	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-key-12345'
9	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///tasks.db'
10	db = SQLAlchemy(app)
11	login_manager = LoginManager(app)
12	login_manager.login_view = 'login'
13	
14	class User(UserMixin, db.Model):
15	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
16	    username = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
17	    password_hash = db.Column(db.String(120), nullable=False)
18	    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)
19	
20	    def set_password(self, password):
21	        self.password_hash = generate_password_hash(password)
22	
23	    def check_password(self, password):
24	        return check_password_hash(self.password_hash, password)
25	
26	class Task(db.Model):
27	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
28	    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
29	    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
30	    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
31	    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
32	    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
33	    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
34	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
35	
36	@login_manager.user_loader
37	def load_user(user_id):
38	    return User.query.get(int(user_id))
39	
40	@app.route('/')
41	def index():
42	    if current_user.is_authenticated:
43	        tasks = Task.query.filter_by(user_id=current_user.id).order_by(Task.created_at.desc()).all()
44	        return render_template('index.html', tasks=tasks)
45	    return render_template('welcome.html')
46	
47	@app.route('/register', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
48	def register():
49	    if request.method == 'POST':
50	        username = request.form.get('username')
51	        password = request.form.get('password')
52	        if User.query.filter_by(username=username).first():
53	            flash('Username already exists')
54	            return redirect(url_for('register'))
55	        user = User(username=username)
56	        user.set_password(password)
57	        db.session.add(user)
58	        db.session.commit()
59	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
60	    return render_template('register.html')
61	
62	@app.route('/login', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
63	def login():
64	    if request.method == 'POST':
65	        username = request.form.get('username')
66	        password = request.form.get('password')
67	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
68	        if user and user.check_password(password):
69	            login_user(user)
70	            return redirect(url_for('index'))
71	        flash('Invalid username or password')
72	    return render_template('login.html')
73	
74	@app.route('/logout')
75	@login_required
76	def logout():
77	    logout_user()
78	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
79	
80	@app.route('/task/create', methods=['POST'])
81	@login_required
82	def create_task():
83	    title = request.form.get('title')
84	    description = request.form.get('description')
85	    priority = request.form.get('priority')
86	    due_date_str = request.form.get('due_date')
87	    due_date = None
88	    if due_date_str:
89	        due_date = datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
90	    
91	    task = Task(title=title, description=description, priority=priority, due_date=due_date, owner=current_user)
92	    db.session.add(task)
93	    db.session.commit()
94	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
95	
96	@app.route('/task/toggle/<int:task_id>')
97	@login_required
98	def toggle_task(task_id):
99	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
100	    if task.user_id != current_user.id:
101	        return redirect(url_for('index'))
102	    task.is_done = not task.is_done
103	    db.session.commit()
104	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
105	
106	@app.route('/task/delete/<int:task_id>')
107	@login_required
108	def delete_task(task_id):
109	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
110	    if task.user_id != current_user.id:
111	        return redirect(url_for('index'))
112	    db.session.delete(task)
113	    db.session.commit()
114	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
115	
116	if __name__ == '__main__':
117	    with app.app_context():
118	        db.create_all()
119	    app.run(debug=True)
